seo.title: What Customers Say About Able Care | Able Care
seo.description: Hear directly from home care operators, senior living communities and clinical teams using Able Assess to standardize falls screening and protect outcomes.

blocks.headline: What our customers say.
blocks.subtitle: Hear directly from the home care operators, senior living teams and clinicians using Able Assess in the field.

testimonials.quote: I really like that it is a preventative tool, not a reactive tool. If we use it out of the gate with customers we really can prevent falls.
All of the therapists on the team love how quick and easy this is to use.
testimonials.organization: Outpatient PT Provider in Senior Living

testimonials.quote: This really is like the blood pressure cuff for falls screening.
A lot of therapists in skilled nursing are not doing standardized testing regularly. I want to show them this and go 'do you know how easy this is?'

blocks.heading: Where Able Assess is in use
